title: XML | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# XML

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/xml/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update the XML-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **XML**.
